---
title: "05_Patient_List_Responsive"
output: html_document
---

# Patient List Analysis Respomsive Piece

This report explores the impact of recent attempts to reduce ghost patients in the GP patients registered dataset

## Introduction


```{r}

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)

practice_change <- monthly_practice %>%
  filter(
    Period %in% as.Date(c("2025-10-01", "2026-06-01"))
  ) %>%
  select(GP_Practice_Code, Period, Avg_Size) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = Period,
    values_from = Avg_Size
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Size_Change = `2026-06-01` - `2025-10-01`
  ) %>%
  arrange(Size_Change)

ggplot(
  practice_change,
  aes(
    x = reorder(GP_Practice_Code, Size_Change),
    y = Size_Change
  )
) +
  geom_col(fill = "steelblue") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = 2) +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "Change in GP practice list size",
    subtitle = "June 2026 minus October 2025",
    x = "GP Practice",
    y = "Change in list size"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

```






```{r}
ggplot(
  monthly_overall,
  aes(
    x = Period,
    y = Avg_Size
  )
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2, colour = "steelblue") +
  geom_point(size = 2, colour = "steelblue") +
  scale_x_date(
    date_breaks = "3 months",
    date_labels = "%b\n%Y"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Total GP registered population",
    subtitle = "June 2022 to June 2026",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Total list size"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  )




```



```{r}

overall_from_practices <- monthly_practice %>%
  filter(
    Period >= as.Date("2025-10-01"),
    Period <= as.Date("2026-06-30")
  ) %>%
  group_by(Period) %>%
  summarise(
    Total_Patients = sum(Avg_Size, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(Period)

ggplot(overall_from_practices, aes(x = Period, y = Total_Patients)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.3, colour = "steelblue") +
  geom_point(size = 2.5, colour = "steelblue") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = comma) +
  scale_x_date(
    date_breaks = "1 month",
    date_labels = "%b %Y"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Total GP registered population",
    subtitle = "October 2025 to June 2026 (summed from practice-level data)",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Total registered patients"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  )

```


```{r}
finances_unique <- finance_datasets %>%
  distinct(Practice_Code, .keep_all = TRUE)

monthly_practice_finance <- monthly_practice %>%
  left_join(
    finances_unique,
    by = c("GP_Practice_Code" = "Practice_Code")
  )

monthly_practice_finance <- monthly_practice %>%
  left_join(
    finances_unique,
    by = c("GP_Practice_Code" = "Practice_Code")
  )

practice_bands <- monthly_practice_finance %>%
  filter(Period == as.Date("2025-10-01")) %>%
  select(GP_Practice_Code, Avg_Size) %>%
  mutate(
    Size_Band = case_when(
      Avg_Size <= 5000  ~ "0-5,000",
      Avg_Size <= 10000 ~ "5,001-10,000",
      Avg_Size <= 15000 ~ "10,001-15,000",
      Avg_Size <= 20000 ~ "15,001-20,000",
      TRUE              ~ "20,000+"
    )
  ) %>%
  select(GP_Practice_Code, Size_Band)

monthly_bands <- monthly_practice_finance %>%
  left_join(practice_bands, by = "GP_Practice_Code")

band_trends <- monthly_bands %>%
  group_by(Size_Band, Period) %>%
  summarise(
    Sum_Practice_Size = sum(Avg_Size, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

ggplot(
  band_trends,
  aes(
    x = Period,
    y = Sum_Practice_Size,
    colour = Size_Band
  )
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_x_date(
    date_breaks = "1 month",
    date_labels = "%b %Y"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Total practice list size over time",
    subtitle = "Practices grouped by their October 2025 list size",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Total list size",
    colour = "October 2025\nsize band"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  )

band_trends_avg <- monthly_bands %>%
  group_by(Size_Band, Period) %>%
  summarise(
    Avg_Practice_Size = mean(Avg_Size, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

ggplot(
  band_trends_avg,
  aes(
    x = Period,
    y = Avg_Practice_Size,
    colour = Size_Band
  )
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  scale_x_date(
    date_breaks = "1 month",
    date_labels = "%b %Y"
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Avg practice list size over time",
    subtitle = "Practices grouped by their October 2025 list size",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Total list size",
    colour = "October 2025\nsize band"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)
  )
```

```{r}
contract_trends <- monthly_practice_finance %>%
  group_by(Contract_Type, Period) %>%
  summarise(
    Total_Patients = sum(Avg_Size, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )


ggplot(
  contract_trends,
  aes(
    x = Period,
    y = Total_Patients,
    colour = Contract_Type
  )
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  labs(
    title = "Total registered patients over time",
    subtitle = "Grouped by Contact Type",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Total patients",
    colour = "Contact Type"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

```


```{r}
Dispensing_trends <- monthly_practice_finance %>%
  group_by(Dispensing_Practice, Period) %>%
  summarise(
    Total_Patients = sum(Avg_Size, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )


ggplot(
  Dispensing_trends,
  aes(
    x = Period,
    y = Total_Patients,
    colour = Dispensing_Practice
  )
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  labs(
    title = "Total registered patients over time",
    subtitle = "Grouped by Dispensing Status",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Total patients",
    colour = "Dispensing Practice"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

```


```{r}
Rurality_trends <- monthly_practice_finance %>%
  group_by(Practice_Rurality, Period) %>%
  summarise(
    Total_Patients = sum(Avg_Size, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )


ggplot(
  Rurality_trends,
  aes(
    x = Period,
    y = Total_Patients,
    colour = Practice_Rurality
  )
) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  labs(
    title = "Total registered patients over time",
    subtitle = "Grouped by Rurality",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Total patients",
    colour = "Rurality"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

```
